raw_source.title: Senior Java Developer (On-site)
raw_source.body:
Location:Lahore, Pakistan
(On-site)
Job Type: Full-time
Experience Level: 5+ Years

Role Overview:
We are seeking a skilled Java Developer to join a dynamic engineering team in Lahore. You will be responsible for managing Java/Java EE application development while providing expertise in the full software development lifecycle, from concept and design to testing and deployment.

Key Responsibilities
Design & Development: Build high-availability, scalable, and low-latency applications using Java/J2EE.

Code Quality: Write well-designed, efficient, and testable code.

Integration: Contribute to all phases of the development lifecycle and conduct software analysis, programming, testing, and debugging.

Collaboration: Work closely with the product and design teams to transform complex requirements into technical specifications.

Required Technical Skills
Core Java: Strong proficiency in Java 8 or higher.

Frameworks: Extensive experience with Spring Boot, Spring MVC, and Hibernate.

Microservices: Solid understanding of Microservices architecture and RESTful APIs.

Database: Experience with SQL (MySQL, PostgreSQL) and NoSQL (MongoDB).

Tools: Proficiency with Git, Maven, and Jenkins.

Education & Qualifications
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field.

Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.

Excellent communication skills (verbal and written).

comments.body: 欢迎您提交招聘信息，Rebase 会整理招聘内容，通过公众号发出。
comments.author: github-actions[bot]

raw_source.author: WAQAS1214
